title: Contact the Aboriginal Head Start in Urban and Northern Communities Program - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact the Aboriginal Head Start in Urban and Northern Communities Program
Your questions and comments are important to us. We are committed to providing you with accurate information in a timely manner.
Aboriginal Head Start in Urban and Northern Communities Program Public Health Agency of Canada 785 Carling Avenue, 4 th Floor Address Locator 6804A Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9
Email ahsunc-papacun@phac-aspc.gc.ca
FAX 613-960-6987 (Ottawa)
HTTP Aboriginal Head Start in Urban and Northern Communities (AHSUNC)

### Western Region (Alberta and British Columbia)
Alberta Aboriginal Head Start in Urban and Northern Communities Program Public Health Agency of Canada 815 Canada Place 9700 Jasper Avenue Edmonton, AB T5J 4C3
British Columbia Aboriginal Head Start in Urban and Northern Communities Program Public Health Agency of Canada Abbott Building, 3 rd Floor 301-351 Abbott Street Vancouver, BC V6B 0G6

### Prairies (Manitoba and Saskatchewan)
Manitoba Aboriginal Head Start in Urban and Northern Communities Program Public Health Agency of Canada Stanley Knowles Building 391 York Ave., Room 246 Winnipeg, MB R3C 4W1
Saskatchewan Aboriginal Head Start in Urban and Northern Communities Program Public Health Agency of Canada South Broad Plaza 2045 Broad Street Regina, SK S4P 3T7
Aboriginal Head Start in Urban and Northern Communities Program Public Health Agency of Canada 11 th Floor, 180 Queen Street West 180 Queen Street West Toronto, ON M5V 3L7
Aboriginal Head Start in Urban and Northern Communities Program Public Health Agency of Canada Guy-Favreau Complex - East Tower, 11 th Floor, Suite 1100 200 René-Lévesque Blvd. West Montréal, QC H2Z 1X4

### Atlantic Region (Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, Prince Edward Island and Newfoundland and Labrador)
Aboriginal Head Start in Urban and Northern Communities Program Public Health Agency of Canada Maritime Centre 15 th Floor, Suite 1525 1505 Barrington Street Halifax, NS B3J 3Y6

### Northern Region (Nunavut, Yukon Territory and Northwest Territories)
Aboriginal Head Start in Urban and Northern Communities Program Public Health Agency of Canada 785 Carling Avenue, 3 rd Floor Room 331A2, Address Locator: 6803A Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9
